form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2.5 len at this track March 26 over 1600m defeating Enrich The Heart with 56kg at $2.40. The race before that crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 4th of 12 at this track on February 20 over 1600m, 4 len behind Non Fiction with 56kg at $8.60. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.
